name: adcelerate-post-board
description: Brand-aware social post & carousel studio — brief → editable DOM/CSS slide editor → PNG/PDF export

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun run build:editor
scripts.build:editor: test -f editor/src/main.ts && bun build editor/src/main.ts --outdir editor/dist || echo 'editor/src/main.ts not found — skipping editor bundle'
